Episodes.Title: Deadly Silence
Episodes.Writer: Andrew Kaufman, Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Kevin Kruchkywich, Rachel Blair
Episodes.Plot: When a private Learjet crashes in South Dakota, USA, with star golfer Payne Stewart, investigators are under pressure to figure out how the plane strayed so far off course before crashing.

Episodes.Title: 9/11: The Pentagon Attack
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Doug Crosbie
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Landy Cannon, Matt Aymar
Episodes.Plot: See how the Pentagon attack on 9/11 was carried out and how it permanently altered air travel today.

Episodes.Title: Disaster at Tenerife
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alex Bystram
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Kevin Hare, Anthony Ulc
Episodes.Plot: Join us as we examine the 1977 crash at Los Rodeos Airport that killed 583 people and the shocking reasons behind it.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Detail
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Brad Wetherly
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Ken Pak, Adrian Nguyen
Episodes.Plot: China Airlines Flight 120 catches fire after the plane has landed, parked and had its engines switched off. An evacuation follows. The pilots must escape from a cockpit window. The blaze all but destroys the aircraft.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Detour
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Andrew Kaufman
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Roger Doche, Dan Krantz
Episodes.Plot: Enroute Flight 706 from Lyon to Lorient is knocked out of the sky over Baie de Quiberon France.

Episodes.Title: Dangerous Approach
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alix MacDonald
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Bill Ratner
Episodes.Plot: Disaster strikes on way to Durango - La Plata Colorado for commuters.

Episodes.Title: Murder in the Skies
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Julia Nunes
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Noah Davis, Travis Jay Riley
Episodes.Plot: On an ordinary day Germanwings flight 9525 has an outcome beyond belief in March 2015 on the French Alps.

Episodes.Title: River Runway
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Carl Knutson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Leon Aureus, Marcus Le
Episodes.Plot: After losing both engines and all electrical power in a violent storm, the pilots of Garuda Indonesia Flight 421 manage a remarkable emergency landing.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Solution
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Eric Weinthal
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Lorne Hiro, Romaine Waite
Episodes.Plot: The captain of Air Asia Flight 8501 overrides the computers instructions and his impromptu fix leads to a deadly stall over the Java Sea.

Episodes.Title: Afghan Nightmare
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Julia Nunes
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Brandon Coffey, Anthony Gerbrandt
Episodes.Plot: A 747 cargo plane crashes seconds after taking off from a U.S. airfield in Afghanistan, and an overlooked piece of evidence eventually tells investigators they were wrong about the cause.
